vibe: High-Performance Minimalism, architectural, clean, decisive, unsentimental

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-none

spacing_and_layout.expertise_grid_mode: The 'Control Room' Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gaps and sharp edges.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align text for dense content, explicitly define center-alignments only for Hero and major section titles.

navigation.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050914]/70 border-b border-white/10 shadow-sm

hero.overlay_classes: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#050914]/80 via-[#050914]/60 to-[#050914]
hero.content_alignment: Centered, strong typographic hierarchy. H1 must pop.

expertise_cards.classes: border-r border-b border-white/10 p-8 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors duration-300
expertise_cards.note: Strip standard card shadows and radii. Use border-collapse style layout for a 'naked' structural feel.

methodology_timeline.description: A vertical line on the left (or center) connecting nodes. Use framer-motion to fill the line on scroll. Nodes are: Diagnosis -> Structure -> Execution -> Results.

mid_page_cta.classes: bg-[#2563EB] text-[#050914] py-32 px-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center
mid_page_cta.typography: Use pure black/deep navy for text to ensure maximum contrast against the pure blue.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2563EB] text-white hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold tracking-wide transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(37,99,235,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(37,99,235,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold tracking-wide transition-all

hero_background.alt: Dark abstract geometric architectural core expanding

motion_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST explicitly set text color on hover. Use border color transitions (white/10 to white/30) for subtle lifts.
motion_interactions.scroll_animations: Use Framer Motion `whileInView` for staggered list reveals and timeline node activation.
motion_interactions.parallax: Subtle parallax on the hero background image.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images uses text-shadow or a strong gradient overlay.
accessibility.test_ids: Add `data-testid` to all forms, links, buttons, and methodology nodes. Use kebab-case (e.g., `data-testid="hero-cta-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Load `Cabinet Grotesk` from Fontshare (CDN) or use a similar system fallback. Load `EB Garamond` from Google Fonts.
Never use Shadcn default Card components for the Expertise grid. Build it manually with HTML/Tailwind for the 'Grid Borders' architectural look.
Implement the Methodology section as a visual timeline using framer-motion.
The Contact form must use customized Shadcn form components, heavily styled to match the dark 'Grid Borders' theme (no default rounded Vercel-look borders, use square corners).
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for structural/architectural iconography.
Skip the Case Studies section entirely as requested.
Images APIs were unavailable; you MUST use the provided Unsplash URLs in the `media_urls` object.
